snippet.title: Clayface | Official Teaser
snippet.description:
Look fear in the face. #ClayfaceMovie only in theaters this October. 

DC Studios’ first-ever foray into the genre, “Clayface” is a horror thriller from director James Watkins, starring Tom Rhys Harries in the title role of the Gotham City villain.

“Clayface” unravels one man’s horrifying descent from rising Hollywood star to revenge-filled monster in a story that explores the loss of one’s identity and humanity,
corrosive love, and the dark underbelly of scientific ambition.

The film also stars Naomi Ackie, David Dencik, Max Minghella and Eddie Marsan, as well as Nancy Carroll and Joshua James. James Watkins directs from a screenplay by Mike Flanagan and Hossein Amini, story by Flanagan, based on characters from DC. The film is produced by Matt Reeves, Lynn Harris, James Gunn and Peter Safran, with Michael E. Uslan, Rafi Crohn, Paul Ritchie, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther executive producing.

Watkins’ creative team includes director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer James Price, editor Jon Harris, visual effects supervisor Angus Bickerton, costume designer Keith Madden, and casting director Lucy Bevan. 

DC Studios Presents, in association with Domain Entertainment, a 6th & Idaho Production, a James Watkins Film, “Clayface.” The film will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures and released only in theaters in North America on October 23, 2026, and internationally beginning 21 October 2026.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: FAST AND FURIOUS 11: The Final Ride (2026) | Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#FastAndFurious11 #VinDiesel #ConceptTrailer2026

Watch This Fast and Furious 11 Concept Trailer That Takes the Franchise to Its Final Ride

What if the Fast saga saved its most explosive chapter for last? This 2026 concept trailer imagines the ultimate final showdown bringing Dominic Toretto back for one last ride with the biggest ensemble the franchise has ever assembled. Vin Diesel returns behind the wheel alongside Dwayne Johnson's Luke Hobbs, Jason Statham's Deckard Shaw, and Jason Momoa reprising his role as the unpredictable Dante Reyes. Old rivalries are buried as a new global threat forces enemies to become allies, and the only crew capable of stopping it is the family Dom built over two decades of chaos, loyalty, and quarter mile races that somehow saved the world.

I personally created the full storyboard and every visual in this concept trailer from the ground up, designing each sequence to capture the insane vehicular action and emotional family drama that made Fast and Furious a cultural phenomenon. This is a "What If" creative project exploring what the final Fast and Furious movie could look like with every fan favorite character united on screen for one last impossible mission. Whether you've been riding with this franchise since the original 2001 street racing days or jumped in when the crew started launching cars out of planes, this trailer was built to give you chills and remind you why family always wins.

Disclaimer: This is an unofficial fan-made concept trailer. All storyboard work and visuals were created entirely by me. This project is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Universal Pictures, One Race Films, Original Film, or any official Fast and Furious production.



Along with fan-made trailers, I also share movie reviews, news, and updates from the world of entertainment. Be sure to hit that subscribe button and stay updated on all the latest from my channel!

But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they don’t, it’s GAME OVER!

1. Open Minecraft

6. Type in the Port: 19132

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: Toyota Corolla Convoy | Buying a New Battery for My Grandpa’s Old Corolla ❤️🔋 | BeamNG| Logitech G29
snippet.description:
In today’s BeamNG episode, we take the Toyota Corolla out on a convoy mission to buy a new battery for my grandpa’s old Corolla ❤️🔋

The car has been struggling to start, so it’s time to fix it and bring it back to life. We cruise through city streets and highways in a smooth convoy, making our way to the auto parts store.

Using the Logitech G29 steering wheel, the driving feels realistic and immersive in BeamNG.drive, especially during careful driving and convoy coordination.

This is more than just a simple trip — it’s about helping family and restoring an old car with meaning.

Will the new battery fix everything? 👀

Watch until the end to see if the Corolla starts again!
